about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Building AI systems that work in production, not just in notebooks
about.intro: Hey! I'm an ML engineer obsessed with running large language models locally, without cloud crutches. I design production systems where AI actually works — not in a Jupyter notebook, but under load, with monitoring and SLAs.
about.story_1: It all started with Python and classic backend development. Then ML came along — and I realized the most exciting work happens at the intersection: when you need not just to train a model, but to deploy it in production, wrap it with APIs, set up autoscaling, and make sure it doesn't crash at 3 AM.
about.story_2: Over the past years, I've built a cloud ASR platform with 10 microservices and GPU inference via Triton and Ray Serve. Fine-tuned LLMs from 0.5B to 32B parameters with QLoRA for contract analysis. Deployed a SOC system with ML-based attack detection across 8 instances throughout Russia.
about.story_3: I care about engineering culture as much as ML: clean architecture, type safety, tests, CI/CD, monitoring. Code is a product, and it should be as reliable as the model inside it.
about.exp_llm_desc: Triton, vLLM, Ray Serve, Ollama, QLoRA fine-tuning. Benchmarks on DGX Spark, latency optimization for production.
about.exp_llm_example: ASR platform · Fine-tuned Qwen 0.5B–32B · AI contract analysis
about.exp_cv_desc: YOLOv8 (mAP50 93%), historical document OCR, satellite imagery analysis, speaker diarization.
about.exp_cv_example: Object detection · XVIII century manuscript OCR · Territory monitoring
about.exp_backend_desc: FastAPI, microservices (up to 10 services), Clean Architecture, custom parsers, WebSocket streaming.
about.exp_mlops_desc: Docker, CI/CD, Grafana + Prometheus, 4 data centers, 99.982% uptime. Full cycle from dev to production.
about.diff_title: What I Bring to a Project

about.diff_prod_desc: Not experiments — monetized platforms with SLAs and real users

about.diff_code_desc: SDKs, documentation, monitoring, CI/CD — code that lives in production for years
